title: Date when fees are due
doc_html:
§5589.  Date when fees are due

All fees proper of the sheriff shall be due and collectible every six months from the institution of the suit.

Redesignated from R.S. 33:1510 pursuant to Acts 2011, No. 248, §3.
doc_text:
§5589.  Date when fees are due
All fees proper of the sheriff shall be due and collectible every six months from the institution of the suit.
Redesignated from R.S. 33:1510 pursuant to Acts 2011, No. 248, §3.
